params.TriggerDescription: Whenever NICKNAME or another double-faced artifact you control enters, mill three cards. You may put an artifact card from among them into your hand.
Whenever CARDNAME enters or attacks, transform up to one other target double-faced artifact you control. Create two 1/1 colorless Gnome artifact creature tokens.
